---
name: Asset pack proposal
about: Propose a new asset source or pack for the open library ecosystem
title: "[Assets] "
labels: ["assets"]
assignees: []
---

## Source

What collection or source are you proposing?

## Provenance

Who created it, and where is the official source page?

## License

What license or reuse terms apply?

## Redistribution Confidence

Explain why the source can be safely distributed or referenced by HelixCanvas.

## Metadata Quality

Does the source already provide titles, tags, authors, attribution guidance, or categories?

## Why It Helps

What use cases would this pack unlock?

## Open Questions

List anything still uncertain before implementation.
